JUDGMENT FOR RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISES AT 106 SIXTH STREET NO. 404, SAN FRANCISCO, CA; FORFEITURE OF RENTAL AGREEMENT; BACK RENT ORDERED OF $1,480.00; $951.48 ($26.43 PER DAY X 36 DAYS) UNLAWFUL DETAINER DAMAGES FOR A TOTAL JUDGMENT OF $2,431.48; NO ATTY FEES, COSTS OR INTEREST AWARDED; $26.43 PER DIEM HOLD OVER AWARDED.
